name: hidden_gem
description: Hidden gem market: 6 merchants compete for scarce gemstones. Local custom — traders who reveal what they seek get price-gouged. Conceal your needs.

agents.strategy_prompt: MARKET NORM: Traders who mention what they need get immediately price-gouged by every other merchant. Never state your target items. Discuss only what you offer.
